name: About
description:
Our Project: Shop for Sports Fans

We are developing a modern e-commerce platform tailored for sports enthusiasts. Our goal is to provide a seamless shopping experience for jerseys, equipment, and accessories across multiple sports.

The platform features a React-based customer interface, a Node.js/Express backend, and an admin panel (Vite) to manage products, orders, and users. We aim to combine performance, usability, and style.

As Coders of the Apocalypse, we embrace challenges and deliver high-quality code. This project showcases our skills in full-stack development and teamwork.

name: FAQs
description:
Frequently Asked Questions

How do I place an order?

Simply browse our products, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout. You’ll need to create an account or log in.

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept all major credit cards and PayPal.

How can I track my order?

Once your order ships, you’ll receive a tracking number via email. You can also view your order status in your account dashboard.

name: Shipping & Delivery
description:
Shipping & Delivery Information

We offer worldwide shipping. Standard delivery takes 3–7 business days. Express shipping (1–3 business days) is available at checkout.

Orders are processed within 24 hours. You’ll receive a confirmation email with tracking details once your order ships.

name: Returns
description:
Returns Policy

You may return unused items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Items must be in original packaging. Return shipping is free.

To start a return, contact our support team at support@sportshop.com with your order number.

name: Privacy Policy
description:
Privacy Policy

We value your privacy. Your personal information is used only to process orders and improve your shopping experience. We do not share your data with third parties without your consent.

For full details, please refer to our complete privacy policy available upon request.
